content: Self-Refine's coarse-grained iterative self-feedback workflow can be enhanced by integrating LLM self-reflection mechanisms' multiple inconsistent solving perspectives, creating a two-layer self-refinement framework that eliminates the need for both external training data and external test cases. This framework first generates multiple divergent initial outputs from different problem-solving perspectives, then uses Self-Refine's iterative loop to prune inconsistent flaws and converge to a higher-quality final result.
